completeForceWithdrawal(uint256,address,.details: Called by strategy after withdrawing from positionVerifies amount, updates accounting, transfers to recipient

dripsDeposit(address,uint256).details: Called by Drips contract when owner transfers idle balance

dripsForceWithdraw(uint256,address,addre.details: Called by Drips contract after collect() accounting when recipient claims streamed fundsCreates withdrawal state that must be consumed by calling completeForceWithdrawalUser must call strategy to withdraw and consume the withdrawal state

dripsReturn(address,uint256).details: Called by Drips contract to reclaim principal

ownerDeposit(address,uint256).details: Allows owner to deposit tokens directly without going through Drips

positionClose(address,address,bytes).details: Strategy returns tokens including fees, YieldManager calculates principal vs yield

positionOpen(address,address,uint256,byt.details: Strategy receives tokens and returns position data

yieldClaim(address,address).details: Can only claim yield that is in liquid balance

dripsDeposit(address,uint256).notice: Deposit funds from Drips to YieldManager

getBalances(address).notice: Get account balances for a token

getWithdrawalState(uint256).notice: Get withdrawal state (for strategy to read)

ownerDeposit(address,uint256).notice: Direct deposit by owner (for testing or direct funding)
